form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after three months finished second of 15 runners at Huntingdon on March 11 over 3200m, 5 len behind Blues Singer with 72.5kg at $7.50. Previously second-up finished third of 15 starters at Leopardstown on December 28 over 4123m, 7 len behind Lazare De Star carrying 71kg at $41. Has found the right race and expected to feature.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Resumes off a 39 day letup. Last run finished third of 8 starters at Doncaster on February 28 over 3900m, slow track; 13 len behind Leader Crik with 73kg at $3.50. The run before finished third in a small field at Lingfield on February 5 over 3910m, on rain affected going; 10 len behind Big Ticket carrying 72.5kg at $3.80. A big run is on the cards.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Last run finished fourth of 8 runners at this track on March 27 over 3500m, 28 len behind Last Round carrying 71kg at $51. At only start last preparation made some head-way from midfield; finished third of 9 runners at Sandown Park on November 9 over 3220m, 16 len behind Le Roi Remi with 71kg at $17. Needs to lift to be considered a winning hope in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung right-handed on the final circuit.

form.formComment: Resuming after three months. Finished off last campaign 3 of 13 starters at Doncaster January 23 over 3900m, slow track; 7 len behind Rathkenny carrying 74.5kg at $2.40. When resuming last campaign 5 of 14 starters at this track November 7 over 3500m, 20 len behind Kocktail Bleu carrying 71.5kg at $4.20. Sure to be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. Won at first race start won by 11 len Eyton-On-Severn on May 5 over 4000m defeating Unleash Hell with 71.5kg in a jumps. form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Last outing finished fourth in a small field at Kempton Park on March 23 over 4200m, 13 len behind Caspari carrying 71kg at $41. The start before that; eased back early on finished third in a small field at this track on February 22 over 3500m, in the wet; 20 len behind Minella Premier carrying 73kg at $41. Rates well on best form and can figure in the finish.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last preparation 5 of 9 runners at Clonmel November 6 over 3319m, slow track; 6 len behind Scope To Improve carrying 70kg at $51. First ever start ran didn't finish the race at Tipperary October 6 over 3319m. Could prove tough to stop.
